message:
feat(spinner): delegate to bubbles/spinner while preserving API

Refactor spinner.go to use bubbles/spinner internally:
- Add mapStyleToBubbles() to map SpinnerStyle enum to bubbles presets
- Store bubbles spinner.Model internally with syncInner() for style sync
- Preserve exact public API (all fields and methods unchanged)
- Handle both SpinnerTickMsg and bubbles TickMsg for interoperability

Tests:
- All 16 existing spinner tests pass
- Add TestSpinnerReducedMotionView: verifies View stability
- Add TestSpinnerBubblesTickMsg: verifies bubbles interop
- Add BenchmarkSpinnerView and BenchmarkSpinnerViewWithGradient

Closes br-ofwdn

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
